---
name: oversized-synthetic-skill
description: A deliberately oversized but still compact synthetic instruction fixture.
---

# Oversized Synthetic Skill

The following numbered items are intentionally repetitive so this file crosses the
approximate instruction-size threshold without requiring a large repository fixture.
